description_long: This is a modern record player with a rectangular wooden base and rounded corners, featuring a black turntable platter at its center. The platter holds a vinyl record with a yellow label, and a black tonearm with a visible stylus is positioned over the record. Two circular speaker grilles are embedded into the top surface, one on each side, and several small control buttons or knobs are located near the front edge. The device is equipped with a large, semi-transparent dust cover made of clear plastic, which is hinged at the back and currently open. The overall design combines retro aesthetics with contemporary materials, making it suitable for home or urban lounge environments.
description: A stylish record player with a wooden base, black platter, built-in speakers, and a clear open dust cover.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open dust cover, central platter with vinyl record, tonearm, and front-facing controls.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the thickness of the dust cover, the tonearm's position, and the layered wood texture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back hinges of the dust cover, the back panel, and the symmetrical speaker layout.
description_view_3: Left-side view emphasizing the dust cover's angle, the platter, and the left speaker grille.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and centrally located on the wooden base. It is black in color, slightly raised, and occupies a significant portion of the device's top surface. The platter has a smooth, matte finish and supports a vinyl record with a yellow label. No visible grooves or additional markings are apparent on the platter itself.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, slender, and black, extending from the right side of the base toward the center of the platter. It appears to be made of metal or high-quality plastic, with a matte finish. The tonearm is positioned over the record, with visible joints at its base for pivoting and lowering.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible, attached to the end of the tonearm, and appears as a small, pointed component. It is likely made of metal and plastic, and is positioned to contact the vinyl record.
attribute_control_knobs: There are several small, round control knobs or buttons located near the front edge of the record player. They are black, made of plastic, and have a smooth finish. No visible labels or markings are discernible from the images.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present, made of clear plastic, and is semi-transparent with a slight gray tint. It is attached to the back of the record player with visible hinges and is currently in the open position. The cover is large enough to protect the entire top surface when closed and appears to be removable.
